# Mixpanel manual setup — generated by provision-dashboards.ts

Generated: 2026-05-19T21:50:14.199Z
Project: 4014921 @ https://eu.mixpanel.com

## Why this exists

Mixpanel's free-tier API does not expose programmatic create for cohorts
with arbitrary selectors, funnel reports, board layouts, or alerts.
This checklist gives you the exact spec for each item — copy-paste into
the corresponding Mixpanel UI builder.

## Cohorts

Go to https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/4014921/cohorts → New Cohort

### Comparison power users
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users with ≥3 comparison_viewed events in last 14 days.
- **Filter:** `comparison_viewed count >=3 in last 14 days`

### Plan completers
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users who completed the planner at least once.
- **Filter:** `plan_completed count >=1 ever`

### Multi-saved
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users with saves_count >= 5 (people property).
- **Filter:** `people.saves_count >=5`

### High-intent leavers
- **Category:** health
- **Description:** Started plan flow but never completed in last 7 days.
- **Filter:** `plan_started count >=1 AND plan_completed count =0 in last 7 days`

### Category loyal
- **Category:** segment
- **Description:** Users with ≥10 tool_page_viewed for tools in a single category in 30 days.
- **Filter:** `tool_page_viewed grouped by category count >=10 in last 30 days`

### Returning weekly
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users with ≥3 distinct active days in last 14 days.
- **Filter:** `distinct active days >=3 in last 14 days`

### Ad-block users
- **Category:** health
- **Description:** Server tool_visit_redirected without matching client tool_visit_clicked.
- **Filter:** `tool_visit_redirected source=server AND no matching tool_visit_clicked client`

### AI-chat-engaged
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users with ≥2 ai_chat_message events.
- **Filter:** `ai_chat_message count >=2`

### Mobile-only
- **Category:** segment
- **Description:** Users where device_type=mobile on >80% of sessions.
- **Filter:** `super.device_type =mobile in last 30 days`

### Affiliate clickers
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users with ≥1 tool_visit_redirected in 30 days (revenue-adjacent).
- **Filter:** `tool_visit_redirected count >=1 in last 30 days`

### Reviewers
- **Category:** engagement
- **Description:** Users who submitted ≥1 review.
- **Filter:** `review_submitted count >=1 ever`

### Existing-tool mentioner: {tool_slug}
- **Category:** vendor_target
- **Description:** Template — instantiated per top-100 tool. Users whose existing_tools_history people prop contains <tool>. VENDOR TARGET.
- **Filter:** `people.existing_tools_history contains <tool_name>`

## Funnels

Go to https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/4014921/insights → New Report → Funnels

### Acquisition: landing → tool visit
- **Description:** Top-of-funnel revenue flow.
- **Steps:** `page_viewed` → `search_query_submitted` → `tool_page_viewed` → `tool_visit_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 7 days

### Plan flow: start → completion → click-through
- **Description:** Full planner conversion funnel.
- **Steps:** `plan_started` → `plan_intake_submitted` → `plan_completed` → `plan_results_tool_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 7 days

### Recommend: submit → click → visit
- **Description:** /recommend wizard conversion.
- **Steps:** `recommendation_requested` → `recommendation_result_clicked` → `tool_visit_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 1 days

### Review submission abandonment
- **Description:** Where reviewers drop off.
- **Steps:** `review_form_opened` → `review_rating_set` → `review_submitted`
- **Conversion window:** 30 days

### Signup → first save → D7 return
- **Description:** Activation + retention.
- **Steps:** `signup_completed` → `tool_saved` → `page_viewed`
- **Conversion window:** 7 days

### Compare → visit
- **Description:** Compare-driven affiliate clicks.
- **Steps:** `compare_tool_added` → `comparison_viewed` → `tool_visit_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 1 days

### Homepage hero → signup
- **Description:** Hero CTA conversion.
- **Steps:** `hero_cta_clicked` → `signup_started` → `signup_completed`
- **Conversion window:** 1 days

### AI chat: message → tool suggested → tool clicked
- **Description:** AI chat → click-through.
- **Steps:** `ai_chat_message` → `ai_chat_response_received` → `ai_chat_tool_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 7 days

### Saved list → revisit → visit
- **Description:** Saved-list utility.
- **Steps:** `tool_saved` → `saved_list_viewed` → `tool_visit_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 30 days

### Search typing → submit → click
- **Description:** Search abandonment vs completion.
- **Steps:** `search_typing` → `search_query_submitted` → `search_result_clicked`
- **Conversion window:** 1 days

## Boards

Go to https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/4014921/boards → New Board

### North Star  *(operator)*
Top-level health: WAU, activation, affiliate clicks, retention.

Tiles:
- **Weekly Active Users** (insight) — distinct page_viewed by week.
- **New signups (7d)** (insight) — signup_completed count.
- **tool_visit_redirected (7d)** (insight) — Revenue proxy.
- **D7 retention by signup cohort** (retention) — signup_completed → any active event.

### Acquisition  *(operator)*
Channel performance: where users come from + how they convert.

Tiles:
- **Page views by utm_source** (insight) — page_viewed grouped by first_touch_utm_source.
- **Signup rate by channel** (insight) — signup_completed / page_viewed per channel.

### Activation  *(operator)*
Onboarding + first-action funnel.

Tiles:
- **Activation funnel** (funnel) — page_viewed → tool_page_viewed → tool_saved → plan_completed.
- **Time-to-first-save by channel** (insight) — people.first_save_at - signup_at, grouped by utm_source.

### Engagement  *(operator)*
Depth of use: tool views, comparisons, AI chat.

Tiles:
- **tool_page_viewed by hour** (insight) — Traffic heatmap.
- **comparison_viewed depth distribution** (insight) — count by tools_count.
- **AI chat conversation turns** (insight) — ai_chat_message grouped by conversation_turn.

### Retention  *(operator)*
Cohort retention curves.

Tiles:
- **Retention by signup week** (retention) — D1/D7/D30 by cohort.
- **Retention by auth_state** (retention) — Logged-in vs anon return-rate.

### Content  *(operator)*
Blog / best / role page performance.

Tiles:
- **blog_post_viewed top 20** (insight) — 
- **scroll_depth_reached 75%+ rate** (insight) — Content quality grade.

### Search Quality  *(operator)*
Search performance + zero-result detection.

Tiles:
- **Top queries (7d)** (insight) — search_query_submitted top by count.
- **Zero-result rate** (insight) — search_no_results / search_query_submitted.
- **Top abandoned search_typing** (insight) — queries with no matching search_query_submitted.

### Revenue Proxy  *(operator)*
Affiliate clicks + reconciliation with DB.

Tiles:
- **tool_visit_redirected by tool (30d)** (insight) — Per-tool revenue ranking.
- **Mixpanel vs click_logs delta** (insight) — Server-vs-DB reconciliation (target <5%).

### Per-Tool Audience Snapshot ({tool_slug})  *(vendor_pitch)*
PARAMETERIZED per tool. THE salable artifact — one buyable view per vendor.

Tiles:
- **30d unique viewers** (insight) — tool_page_viewed distinct users where tool_slug=X.
- **30d saves + save rate** (insight) — tool_saved / tool_page_viewed.
- **30d affiliate click-throughs** (insight) — tool_visit_redirected — buy-intent.
- **Top 10 tools compared against this one** (insight) — comparison_viewed.tools containing X, grouped by other tools.
- **Plan-inclusion rate** (insight) — plan_results_displayed.recommended_tool_slugs containing X / total plan_completed.
- **Existing-tool mentioner segment** (cohort_count) — people.existing_tools_history contains X.
- **User segment breakdown** (insight) — viewers grouped by first_touch_utm_source, device_type, plan_industry_segment.
- **Funnel: page → save → visit_click** (funnel) — Per-tool conversion.
- **Reviews this month** (insight) — review_submitted.tool_slug=X count + avg rating.

### Category Heatmap  *(vendor_pitch)*
For vendors who want category-level audience data.

Tiles:
- **tool_page_viewed unique users by category × week** (insight) — Heatmap.

## Alerts

Each alert below has manual setup steps via Mixpanel UI (Insights → ⋯ → Set Alert).

### Funnel conversion drop ±30%
- **Description:** Every funnel above.
- **Trigger:** Day-over-day conversion change > 30%.

### tool_visit_redirected drop >25%
- **Description:** Revenue alarm.
- **Trigger:** Daily count drops >25% vs trailing 7d mean.

### error_encountered spike
- **Description:** Quality alarm.
- **Trigger:** >50 errors / day.

### Per-tool z-score >2 (sudden interest)
- **Description:** Vendor opportunity alert.
- **Trigger:** tool_page_viewed for any tool z-score >2 vs its 30d mean.

### signup_completed server-vs-client delta >20%
- **Description:** Identity stitching breakage.
- **Trigger:** |server_count - client_count| / server_count > 20%.

### Search zero-result spike
- **Description:** Catalog gap alert.
- **Trigger:** search_no_results rate >15% in any 1h window.
